title: arenaria tetraquetra subsp. huteri
intro: Arenaria tetraquetra subsp. huteri, also known as the Sardinian sandwort, is a rare species of flowering plant in the carnation family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. Arenaria tetraquetra subsp. huteri can be found in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, although further research is necessary to fully understand its effects on human health.
